_comment: Active narrator catalog. Each voice needs a 3-10s 24 kHz mono WAV here + its EXACT transcript in ref_text (sidecar runs load_asr=False, so it never transcribes the clip). A voice with a missing clip is reported ready:false and rejected at synth time. See README.md / prepare_voice.py.

voices.name: Narrator
voices.ref_text: Here, three females have traveled to a mating ground known as a night club

voices.name: Nova
voices.ref_text: Huh, why don't we torch all the trash into kindling? It'll be nice and warm.

voices.name: Max
voices.ref_text: this show is not suitable for all audiences listener discretion is advised
